prompt: Across all our programs this year, what percentage of registrants are converting to live attendees, and how does that compare to last year?
What is the overall health of our webinar program — total registrations, average attendance rate, and average engagement score?
Which funnel stage is leaking the most — registration-to-live, live-to-engaged, or engaged-to-on-demand?
Show me the top 10 events by registrant-to-attendee conversion rate so I can understand what's driving funnel efficiency.
What is our average no-show rate across all webinars this year, and is it improving or getting worse?
How many total unique companies have we reached across our entire webinar program?
Which audience sources are delivering the highest-converting registrants across all our events?
Show me a bar chart of total registrations per quarter over the last two years.
What is our program's average audience size per event, and how has that trended over the past 12 months?
Which of our audience acquisition sources brings in the most registrants overall?
What topics or themes have driven the highest attendance numbers across our webinar catalog?
Which content topics are generating the strongest registrant-to-attendee conversion rates?
Based on our historical performance data, what topics should we prioritize for next quarter's program?
Are there any content gaps in our webinar program — topics our audience likely wants that we haven't covered?
Which event titles or themes consistently outperform our average attendance rate?
What types of webinar content — panels, demos, thought leadership — tend to get the longest average watch times?
Show me the top 10 events by average engagement score to identify which content formats resonate most.
Which webinar topics have seen declining attendance over the past year that we should retire or refresh?
What is the correlation between webinar topic and audience size based on our event history?
Give me a breakdown of our events by content category and average registrant count per category.
Which speakers in our program have consistently delivered the highest engagement scores?
Who are our top 5 best-performing presenters based on average live attendance?
Which presenters tend to drive the highest registrant-to-attendee conversion rates?
Are there speakers whose events consistently underperform our program average that we should reconsider?
Which internal subject matter experts are our strongest webinar performers based on audience engagement?
Show me a ranked list of our speakers by average event attendance across all their sessions.
Which speaker and topic combinations have produced our highest-performing events?
Do events with external guest speakers outperform events with internal speakers only?
Which presenters have the best average watch time across their events, indicating strong audience retention?
Identify any speakers who appear in multiple top-performing events so we can prioritize booking them again.
What day of the week do our webinars get the highest average attendance?
What time of day drives the best live attendance for our webinars?
How many webinars are we running per month, and is our event cadence consistent?
Are there months where we're over-scheduling webinars and seeing diminishing attendance returns?
What is the optimal frequency for webinars — weekly, biweekly, monthly — based on our audience engagement patterns?
Show me a calendar heatmap of our event frequency and corresponding attendance rates by month.
Which months historically produce the highest registrations for our webinars?
Are there scheduling gaps in our webinar calendar where we're missing audience engagement opportunities?
How does webinar performance differ between morning and afternoon time slots?
What is the best lead time between when we announce a webinar and when we run it, based on registration patterns?
How has our overall program registration volume trended year over year?
Is our average live attendance rate improving, declining, or flat compared to 12 months ago?
Show me a year-over-year comparison of total events run and total registrations collected.
How does our webinar program performance compare to ON24 benchmarks for our industry?
What is the trend in average engagement score across all our webinars over the past 18 months?
Which quarter had our strongest webinar program performance and what drove it?
Show me a rolling 6-month trend of our average registrant-to-attendee conversion rate.
How has our no-show rate trended over the past two years — are our audience engagement tactics working?
What poll questions have we asked most frequently across our webinar program, and what did audiences say?
Which resource types — whitepapers, case studies, demos — are getting downloaded most across our webinar program?
